title: YO25 9AF, J.S.R. Genetics Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/CP3404SW/T002
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: J.S.R. Genetics Limited   Installation name: Southlands Pig Unit   Permit number: EPR/CP3404SW/T002   "
